name: Basil Beef Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the roast on both sides in hot oil in a large Dutch oven.
2. Sprinkle the roast with basil, garlic powder, and pepper; place the onion on top.
3. Add hot water to cover the roast partially.
4. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 2 1/2 hours or until tender.
5. Remove from pan drippings to serve.
